findings.description: Bulk 'Delete All' button in alerts page calls deleteMut.mutate() for each selected alert WITHOUT a confirmation dialog. Single-alert delete has a confirm dialog, but bulk delete bypasses it. Risk of accidental mass deletion.
No E2E tests for new pod table columns (restartCount, ready, cpuPercent, memoryPercent). These are new UI features that need test coverage.
No E2E tests for alerts collapsible groups, bulk select/actions, or alert search. New interactive features need coverage.
No E2E test for AI suggested chips rendering and click behavior.
No E2E test for logs sticky search or JSON pretty-print rendering.
levelColor variable computed inline in both merged and grouped log views — duplicated logic. Extract to a helper function.
resourceItems.filter() called twice with opposite predicates for Clusters vs non-Clusters in CommandPalette. Could partition once for efficiency.
Pod row ready column color logic uses inline split('/') twice. Extract to a variable for clarity.
